MINI MINUTES FOR APR-20-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ROSS MIRKARIMI'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED IN ITS ENTIRETY. ALL OF PETITIONER'S CONTENTIONS CAN AND SHOULD BE ADDRESSED IN THE FIRST INSTANCE BY THE ETHICS COMMISSION AND THE BOARD OF SUPERVISORS AND THEN, IF NECESSARY, BY A FURTHER WRIT SEEKING REVIEW OF THEIR DECISION. PETITIONER IS NOT ENTITLED TO BE PAID WHILE HE IS SUSPENDED. (DERRICK V, CITY OF VALLEJO (1935) 4 CAL. APP. 2D 25, 27). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY RESPONDENT CITY AND C0UNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ED LEE, MAYOR OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

ORDER GRANTING PETITIONER'S APPLICATION FOR EX PARTE ORDER SHORTENING TIME TO NOTICE HEARING ON PETITIONER'S MOTION TO DISQUALIFY SAN FRANCISCO CITY ATTORNEY FROM REPRESENTING RESPONDENT MAYOR EDWIN M. LEE
APPENDIX IN OPPOSITION TO MTN TO DISQUALIFY SF CITY ATTY FILED BY RESPONDENT CITY AND C0UNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ED LEE, MAYOR OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER DENYING PETITIONER'S MOTION TO DISQUALIFY CITY ATTORNEY FROM REPRESENTING MAYOR EDWIN M. LEE

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER ROSS MIRKARIMI'S MOTION TO DISQUALIFY SF CITY ATTORNEY FROM REPRESENTING MAYOR EDWIN M LEE IS DENIED. BECAUSE THE CITY ATTORNEY IS REPRESENTING THE MAYOR IN HIS OFFICIAL CAPACITY WITH RESPECT TO ACTIONS HE TOOK ON BEHALF OF THE CITY IN ACCORDANCE WITH A PROVISION OF THE CHARTER AUTHORIZING THE MAYOR TO TAKE SUCH ACTIONS, THE CITY ATTORNEY IS NOT BARRED FROM REPRESENTING THE MAYOR IN THIS CASE. THE RETENTION OF OUTSIDE COUNSEL BY THE ETHICS COMMISSION AND THE BOARD OF SUPERVISORS MOOTS PETITIONER'S ARGUMENT THAT THERE IS A CONFLICT BETWEEN THE CITY ATTORNEY'S REPRESENTATIONS OF THE MAYOR IN THIS CASE AND THE CITY ATTORNEY'S REPRESENTATION OF THE ETHICS COMMISSION AND THE BOARD OF SUPERVISORS WITH RESPECT TO THE OFFICIAL MISCONDUCT CHARGES AGAINST PETITIONER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion And Hearing On Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Apr-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David P. Waggoner, Esq., of the Law Office of David P. Waggoner, Tel. 415.305.7708, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.
Sherri Sokeland Kaiser, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3886, appearing for Respondent and opposing party.

The matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ROSS MIRKARIMI'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate is denied in its entirety. All of petitioner's contentions can and should be addressed in the first instance by the Ethics Commission and the Board of Supervisors and then, if necessary, by a further writ seeking review of their decision. Petitioner is not entitled to be paid while he is suspended. (Derrick v, City of Vallejo (1935) 4 Cal. App. 2d 25, 27). Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

Ntc Of Mtn To Disqualify Sf City Attorney From Representing Mayor Edwin M Lee; Memo Of P & A And Pos
Off Calendar Apr-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Shepard S. Kopp, Esq., of the Law Office of Shepard S. Kopp, Tel. 310.914.4444, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.
Jon Givner, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.4694, appearing for Respondent and opposing party.

The matter was argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ROSS MIRKARIMI'S Motion To Disqualify SF City Attorney From Representing Mayor Edwin M Lee is Denied. Because the City Attorney is representing the Mayor in his official capacity with respect to actions he took on behalf of the City in accordance with a provision of the Charter authorizing the Mayor to take such actions, the City Attorney is not barred from representing the Mayor in this case. The retention of outside counsel by the Ethics Commission and the Board of Supervisors moots Petitioner's argument that there is a conflict between the City Attorney's representations of the Mayor in this case and the City Attorney's representation of the Ethics Commission and the Board of Supervisors with respect to the official misconduct charges against Petitioner. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

Ntc Of Motion And Hearing On Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate
